items.name: Jade Mattrix Scythe
items.description: The Jade Mattrix Scythe is a formidable weapon that seamlessly combines beauty with lethality. Its blade, crafted from a rare jade-hued alloy, exudes a captivating green radiance. The lightweight and flexible mattrix shaft ensure nimble and precise maneuvers, making it a versatile tool in combat.

items.name: Laser Blade
items.description:
⬇️More: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/?Category=1&CreatorName=cscokr&salesTypeFilter=1
✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

Unleash futuristic precision with the Laser Blade, a weapon that embodies cutting-edge technology and deadly efficiency. The blade emits a concentrated beam of laser energy, capable of slicing through the toughest materials with ease. Its sleek, ergonomic design ensures swift and fluid movements, allowing you to execute precise strikes with unparalleled accuracy. The Laser Blade's energy source is self-replenishing, ensuring it remains a reliable companion in extended battles. Equip the Laser Blade and experience the ultimate fusion of science and combat, making you an unstoppable force on the battlefield.

The Colossus armor is a rendition of the original Juggernaut kit. 
Unlike its predecessor such armor was not made for mere entertainment but rather for total suppression of all opposing forces.

As such its updated armor, reconstructed and reinforced exoskeleton, and additional neck armor reflects this.
